1.description: Value per loan, loan size, and correlation. Bottom line: low correlation (b=0.35); middle line: medium correlation (b=0.25); top line: high correlation (b=0.15).

2.description: Increasing enforcement costs. Panel A plots the value per loan, loan size, and correlation. Solid lines are average loan value and dashed lines are maximum ex ante value. Panel B plots the portfolio size that maximizes average loan value given correlation.
